Hershel’s farm — S2

BACKSTORY

This is the very beginning of season 2, the bathroom scene where Shane shaves his hair off.

Shane went to the high school with Otis to get supplies to save Carls life, but Shane had to sacrifice Otis in order to get back alive on time. Killing an innocent man impacted Shane, causing him to have a whole personality shift.

CONTEXT

  • ﻿﻿Location: Hershel’s farm.

  • ﻿﻿Time: evening — 10:58 PM.

  • TWD timeline: The beginning of season 2.

  • ﻿﻿Context: Shane got back from the traumatic high school scene and he shaved his hair in the bathroom. He is not in a good mood.
